## Biography

Ava Cornelius achieved the rare distinction of maintaining active connections across both Imperial and Federal spheres during a period when superpower relations were notably strained. Her prominence in November 3305 suggested either diplomatic expertise or commercial interests that transcended the political boundaries most citizens never crossed.

Though the exact nature of her activities remains partially obscured in surviving records, her dual affiliation indicated she operated at the highest levels of inter-superpower engagement. Figures capable of navigating both Imperial court politics and Federal corporate culture were vanishingly rare, and Cornelius's brief but intense period of visibility hinted at either a major diplomatic initiative or a business deal of galactic significance. Her subsequent disappearance from headlines suggests either successful completion of her objectives or deliberate retreat from public view.
